title: Regem #7278
definition:
Regem-melech = "king's heap"

 1) a man sent by some of the captivity to make enquiries at the
    temple concerning fasting
nasbUsage:
Definition: Regem-melech = "king's heap"

 1) a man sent by some of the captivity to make enquiries at the
    temple concerning fasting

    NASB:  kings heap, an Isr.
